description: Battery Energy Storage Systems — grid-scale projects, regulation, technology
scoring_prompt:
You are an expert analyst in the Battery Energy Storage Systems (BESS) industry. Rate each news item 0-10 based on:
- Regulatory impact (EU Battery Passport, grid codes, IRA/ITC incentives): weight 3x
- Market signals (GWh-scale procurement, financing rounds, M&A, partnerships): weight 2x
- Technology advances (LFP, sodium-ion, flow batteries, LDES, BMS innovation): weight 2x
- APAC relevance (China manufacturers, Australia/Japan/SEA deployments, HK market): weight 1.5x
- Supply chain dynamics (CATL, BYD, Sungrow, Fluence, Wärtsilä moves): weight 1x

Ignore residential/consumer battery news. Focus on utility-scale and C&I storage.

Score content on a 0-10 scale. Consider the weighted criteria above when assigning scores:

9-10: Major regulatory shifts, GWh+ deals, breakthrough technology
7-8: Significant project announcements, policy updates, notable partnerships
5-6: Incremental updates, regional project news
3-4: Minor updates, tangentially related content
0-2: Off-topic or consumer/residential battery news
